snps.effect_template: ABCG2 Q141K variant. Reduces uric acid excretion, increasing gout risk ~1.7x per allele.
SLC2A9 variant affecting renal urate transport. Second major gout risk locus.
SLC2A9 GLUT9 glucose transporter. Primary urate transporter in kidney and gut.
SLC17A1 urate/anion exchanger. Renal uric acid secretion and reabsorption.
SLC22A12 urate transporter 1 (URAT1). Renal uric acid reabsorption.
GCKR glucokinase regulator. Metabolic pathways affecting serum urate.
PDZK1 PDZ domain containing 1. Renal transporter regulation and urate handling.

recommendation_template: Stay well hydrated. Limit purine-rich foods (organ meats, shellfish), fructose, and alcohol (especially beer). Maintain healthy weight. Monitor uric acid levels.

studies.title: SLC2A9 is a newly identified urate transporter influencing serum urate concentration, urate excretion and gout
studies.finding: ABCG2 rs2231142 and SLC2A9 are major genetic determinants of serum urate and gout risk

studies.title: Genome-wide association analyses identify 18 new loci associated with serum urate concentrations
studies.finding: Identified multiple urate and gout loci including SLC2A9, ABCG2, SLC17A1, SLC22A12, GCKR, and PDZK1
